entry.title: Hunie Pop 2 v3.0.1
entry.content:
- (Client) fixed processing of "Fruit Seeds" items - (Client) added bunch of debug stuff - (GitHub) added PopTracker to repo and releases V3.0.0 Changelog - (repo) Merged APWorld and Client to one git repository - (APWorld/Client) Added option/logic to randomise girl like/disliked tokens, baggage, unique/shoe gifts - (APWorld) Rebuilt APWorld - (APWorld) Added archipelago.json to APWorld for archipelago 0.7.0 compatibility - (Client) Added BepInEx to zip file for easier installing - (Client) Made arch items in the shop have the archipelago logo - (Client) Removed temp baggage - (Client) Made girl detail screen show what unique/shoe gifts you haven't given yet
BACKUP YOU ORIGINAL SAVE CANT GUARANTEE THAT IT WONT GET CORRUPTED Windows save location: "C:/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/AppData/LocalLow/HuniePot/HuniePop 2 - Double Date/" Mac save location: "/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/Library/Application Support/com.HuniePot.HuniePop2-DoubleDate/" CLIENT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Hunie Pop 2 Installed - Download Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin.zip" to the directory where "HuniePop 2 - Double Date.exe" is - play and connect to a Archipelago server APWORLD INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Huniepop 2 APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Huniepop 2 APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Huniepop 2 YMAL POPTRACKER INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - copy contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago PopTracker.zip" into the packs folder in the poptracker install directory

entry.title: YAYARG v2.5.0
entry.content:
## Yet Another YARG AP V2.5.4
### Client Changes - Rework drum compatibility. Five lane and four lane are now interchangeable and able to complete each others pools. Pro and Elite can now complete any drum pool. - Fix nightly build no longer showing filler counts due to menu redesign - Fix nightly not re-selecting the AP menu after completing a song.
### YAML Creator Changes - Fix inclusion lists not being considered when culling songs.
Tested against [YARG nightly b3586](https://github.com/YARC-Official/YARG-Bleedingedge/releases/tag/b3586) ***Newer version may be incompatible.***
This client is compatible with worlds generated on V2.5.0 and up.
Setup Guide: https://github.com/Thedrummonger/Archipelago/blob/YARGV2/worlds/yayarg/docs/guide_en.md

entry.title: Tevi v1.4.16
entry.content: ## Changelog + Teleporter popup missing fixed + DreamKeeper - Money Room X: 24 Y: 21 -> removed unreachable condition (Clusterbomb) + Missing traps fixed (AP) + Missing Potions and other items fixed (AP)

entry.title: Metroid Zero Mission v0.5.2
entry.content:
## Options changes * Fixed a crash from entering nothing for Junk Fill Weights (@gerbiljames)
## Universal Tracker changes * Fixed logic mismatch issues, mostly from not accounting for layout patches correctly * Fixed a generation crash on Mecha Ridley goal
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lilDavid/Archipelago-Metroid-Zero-Mission/compare/0.5.1...0.5.2

entry.title: Wario Land 4 v3.3.3
entry.content:
## Logic changes * Added tricks to clear Monsoon Jungle and get the CD box with grab instead of ground pound
## Options changes * Fixed starting with multiple progressive ground pounds not working
## Universal Tracker changes * UT is now usable without an options yaml * Added support for locations reachable out of logic
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lilDavid/Archipelago-Wario-Land-4/compare/3.3.2...3.3.3

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Seasons v20.0.2
entry.content:
### This apworld is only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7
## 🗳️ New Options * Puzzle and Minigames rando * When randomized, the games are about as hard as vanilla, with 2 less screens for hide & seek * Owl-related puzzles are not affected * No push block is added * Linked Hero's cave can now be made reachable from a warp in the regular hero's cave
## ⏫ Miscellaneous Improvements * Used up gasha spots are now represented with the dug tile * The game now shows which item is being obtained when the item is from a different world * Generation is faster * Asking for `included essences` placed essences will set the placed essences to the number included
## 🧠 Logic * Cane of somaria is now a in-logic way to kill golden beasts (it's decently hard) * Bomb/bombchu requirement is now more consistent, unless there is a consistent way to refill it * 40 bombs are required to fight * 20 bombs are required to destroy bombable tiles * 20 bombs are required for bombjumps * 20 bombchus are required to fight * 40 bombchus are required to destroy tiles * Jumping the goron pits with just a cape has been upgraded from medium to hard logic * Some anti-softlocks have been removed, which affects some of the logic * Added a logic path to leave d2 * Fixed a logic issue where the d8 spinner chest was reachable without magnet glove * Added a hell logic path from frypolar to d8 spinner chest without magnet glove
## 🛠️ Bugfixes * Made use of pre_output, unit tests now work on OoS * Fixed a text at random being broken each seed * Fixed dimitri clipping and respawning at the closed d4 entrance * Melting the red and blue ores, then leaving the room to come back no longer gives hard ore instead of the normal item

entry.title: Factorio: Space Age v2.0.2
entry.content:
# Factorio: Space Age apworld v2.0.2
* Fix `filler_count` being ignored. Fixes #13.
download: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/releases . general docs: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/en_Factorio_Space_Age.md . setup guide: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/setup_en.md . source code: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/tree/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age .

entry.title: Slime Rancher v0.2.3
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Minor fixes to logic and location names, there are 2 *possible* incompatible locations from worlds generated with v0.2.2 due to them previously having an extra space - Treasure Pod - Glass Desert Western Ruins - Treasure Pod - Glass Desert Leftside Isle - [Client] (HOPEFULLY) Fixed save errors - [Client] Extended timeout timer from 4s to 60s - [Client] Extended the trap delay range from 30s-60s to 12s-60s - [Client] Fixed a bug where reaching 7Zee lvl 28 would goal regardless of goal type - [Client] Added version number - [Client] Fixed Note Goal being susceptible to collect - [Client] Custom Assets now loads on connect - [Client] Traplink, added support for the following traps: - Banner, Chaser, Clear Image, Disarm, Explosion, Flip Horizontal, Flip Vertical, Frost, Gas, Help, Hey!, Inverted Mouse, Mana Drain, Ninja, Person, Reverse Controls, Sandstorm, Teleport, TNT, Tool Swap, Undo, Whirlpool, Zoom In, Zoom Out - [Client] Forgot to implement the functionality of `Give random traps for unknown traps` - [Client] Made the game tell you when trap linked, and if you have entered an area without an unlock - [Client] Changed how the mod is structured slightly (in preparation for updating to melon 7.2) - IF YOU ARE UPDATING before running the game delete the `Slimipelago.dll` in the `Slime Rancher/Mods/SW_CreeperKing.Slimipelago` folder

entry.title: Dicey Dungeons v0.2.5b0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Character replacements for "~", "[", "]", "|", and "@" to prevent breakage.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/compare/v0.2.4-beta...v0.2.5-beta

entry.title: Stardew Valley v7.4.4
entry.content: - Fixed sorting on the Dr Seuss Bundle - Fixed an issue where multiplayervision tags could double up - Updated dependencies

entry.title: Pokemon Crystal v5.4.0
entry.content:
# Changelog
## New Logic Options - **Route 30 Access**: Sets whether the battle on Route 30 ends when talking to Mr. Pokémon or giving the Mystery Egg to Prof. Elm. - **South Kanto Access**: Sets the position of the landslide blocking access to southern Kanto, either Route 19 or Route 21. - **South Kanto Condition**: Sets the condition to remove the landslide, either entering southern Kanto from the unblocked side or restoring power. - **Randomize Pokédex**: Sets whether to include the Pokédex in the randomized item pool, keep it vanilla, or start with it. The Pokédex is required for Dex(count)sanity checks, Pokémon requests and Pokémon trades.
## Co-op - **Event Sync**: Certain events which gate progress in the game will now sync between players on the same slot when Remote Items is enabled. These are: - Number of gyms beaten. - Elms aide being in Violet Pokécenter after beating Falkner. - Access to Azalea gym after clearing Slowpoke well. - Access to Ecruteak gym after releasing the beasts. - Jasmine being in Olivine gym. - Access to Mahogany gym after clearing Rocket Base. - Access to Blackthorn gym after clearing Radio Tower. - Access to Dragon's Den after beating Clair. - Blue being in Viridian gym. - The NPCs returning to the Charcoal Kiln in Azalea after herding Farfetch'd. - Bill being in Goldenrod after meeting him in Ecruteak. - Suicune appearing in the overworld, and being able to receive the Eon Mail from Eusine. - Access to the gift shop in Mahogany Town after clearing Radio Tower. - Restoring power to Kanto. - Which Unown letters you can encounter. - **Tracker Slots**: You can now set a "Tracker Slot" in the game options, setting the equivalent option in the tracker will allow you to autotrack only your own map changes when playing a co-op seed. - Fly unlocks are now Plando'd to their original locations when Randomize Fly Unlocks is off and Remote Items is on, so they are shared between slots.
## New Traps - **Tutorial Trap**: Triggers the catch tutorial. - **Teleport Trap**: Overworld: Teleports to you to your current spawn point. Battle: Uses Teleport as your next move, this works in trainer battles and will force you to switch out. - **Whirlpool Trap**: Overworld: Spins you around and plays soothing Whirlpool sounds. Battle: Traps you in Whirlpool for 99 turns. - **Explosion Trap**: Overworld: Your first party member faints. Battle: Uses Explosion as your next move. - **Sandstorm Trap**: Overworld: Slows you down for a short time. Battle: Creates a Sandstorm which lasts 99 turns. - **Metronome Trap**: Overworld: Triggers a random move-based trap. Battle: Uses Metronome as your next move. - **Ice Trap**: Makes the floor icy for a short time.
## Quality of Life - **Fast Surf**: An in-game option to Surf at Bicycle speed. - **HM Compatibility Override**: An option to override compatibility for specific HMs, for example you can make Fly 100% compatible while all other HMs are 0% compatible (meaning a single species can learn them). - **Move Modernisation**: Allows you to modernise moves to a specific generation from 3-9, choosing buffs only, nerfs only or both. - **Maximum Evolution Level**: Allows specifying the maximum level at which evolutions will start to trigger. - **Base Stats Multiples of 5**: When enabled, attempts to ensure all base stats are multiples of 5 if they are randomized. - **Custom Level Curves**: A set of options which allows defining custom level curves for level scaling to use. - Talking to or calling Prof. Elm will now tell you your goal. - A new page when viewing Pokémon data which shows their base stats and Hidden Power info. - The MORE page in the Pokédex now shows if a Pokémon can be found in the bug catching contest. - Running from the Pokécenter 2F battle will now always succeed. - Blackbelt Kenji on Route 45 will now always be on break when you call him, this was previously random.
## Other Option Changes - **Randomize Item Values**: Randomizes the base cost of items, which can affect their buy price and always affects their sell price. - **Enforce Breeding Methods Logic**: Sets whether the game will only allow you to breed according to your Breeding Methods Required setting. - Weights can now be used in TM Plando. - Trap weights have been combined into a single option, the old options are still accepted for backwards compatibility. - Options which accept lists of Pokémon can now accept types, these will resolve dynamically with type randomization. - Options which accept lists of Pokémon can now accept `_Non-legendaries` which resolves to all non-legendary Pokémon. - Move randomization options have been decoupled so they can now all be provided individually. - All Pokédex locations are now in a location group that is just the Pokémon name, for ease of hinting (thanks @Darvitz). - Lock Kanto Gyms is now disabled when level scaling is enabled.
## Bug Fixes - Fix all exp calculations being slightly incorrect, this was previously causing some split exp to round to 1 for Pokémon with small exp yield. - Fix battling CAL in Viridian City while never having saved instantly ending the battle and causing weird side effects. - Fix level scaling considering the trainers east of Mount Moon in the same sphere as those in Cerulean and on Route 25. - Fix level scaling not considering restoring power to Kanto as a break in spheres. - Prevent invalid items from being used in YAML options. - Prevent Unown from appearing in the wild if you have goal to set to Unown hunt and you priority the Unown dexsanity location. - Fix not being able to wake Snorlax from the two tiles north of it. - Currency symbols in multiworld item names will now map to the Pokédollar symbol. - Fix a generation failure when forcing sphere 1 starters in combination with the Slotlock APWorld. - Only queue a single deathlink when receiving multiple. - The Pokécenter 2F battle will no longer interact with deathlink. - Map `É` in item and player names to `é` ingame, instead of `?`. - Fix fishing encounters on Routes 12, 13 and 32 not appearing in the MORE pages of the Pokédex. - Fix music being inconsistent between loading a save while on the bicycle and getting on the bicycle when music was completely random. - Fix a softlock when receiving a trainer phone call immediately after using Surf in the overworld. - Prevent shop items from being purchasable for below their sell price when set to `item_price`. - Fix Pokédex search returning incorrect results if left or right were input while the cursor was on Search. - Pressing A in Pokédex search while selecting a move now moves the cursor to Search instead of changing the selected move. - Fix Suicune in Cianwood transforming into the player sprite when exiting the building near it.
## Miscellaneous - The Everstone given by Professor Elm after hatching the Togepi egg is now a check, it requires you to show him the species that hatched from the egg, or anything that evolves from it (thanks @snowflav-goob). - Cal in Viridian Trainer House is now a trainersanity check, he is logically locked in the same way as Kanto gyms. - Enabling Apricorns for Shopsanity but not randomizing berry trees will not add the Apricorns to the item pool, their logical source is now their original trees. - New phone traps. - Fiore is now a possible region for hint phone traps (thanks @snowflav-goob). - HM Compatibility is now printed to the spoiler log for HMs that fewer than 20% of Pokémon can learn. - :3

entry.title: NSMBW v0.0.3
entry.content:
# Features * Support all game versions ( untested, report on dc what does not and I will try to fix) * Options (lots of options are now working)
# Bug fixes * Death link Should be working * Lots of other

entry.content:
# Bnyuu ## Changelog + bnyuu + Fixing vanilla upgrade + start inventory again + bnyuu + new trap -> Invisible Tevi + bnyuu
bnyuu

entry.title: evolve_v0.3.14 v0.3.14
entry.content:
# Evolve Incremental v0.3.14
Free - Unstable - APWorld Only
[client](<https://the1stburb.github.io/Evolve>) | [apworld](<https://github.com/the1stburb/EvolveAPWorld>)
# Warning
This release may be bugged, because of the extent of the changes. Mostly, each genus needs to be gone through, but... that is time consuming.
Also i just realized that i completely forgot to make the new options do things on the client...
### Do I need to redownload the APWold?
Yes, but it might be bugged.
## APWorld - Added a new option for choosing your genus, and - Changed the way locations are added, so that genuses with different tech trees dont have impossible locations. - v0.3.12 - Fixed Location: Gantry Cranes not triggering - v0.3.13
## Client - Fixed Power Bonus and Malus not having an effect. - v0.2.7 - Resource Bonus giving NaN amount for Crafting Materials (twice) - v0.2.8 - Fanaticism not working when no previous race selected. - v0.2.9 - Chat Message showing the wrong player (yourself) giving you items, and then duplicating the message - v0.2.11 - Unlocking (most) species, so they can be selected - v0.2.12

entry.title: evolve_v0.3.15 v0.3.15
entry.content:
# Evolve Incremental v0.3.15
Free - Unstable - APWorld Only
[client](<https://the1stburb.github.io/Evolve>) | [apworld](<https://github.com/the1stburb/EvolveAPWorld>)
# Warning
This release may be bugged, because of the extent of the changes. Mostly, each genus needs to be gone through, but... that is time consuming.
### Do I need to redownload the APWold?
Yes, but it might be bugged.
## APWorld - Added a new option for choosing your genus, and - Changed the way locations are added, so that genuses with different tech trees dont have impossible locations; and - Added new Options: Death Percent, Genus and Universe; and - Removed Option: planet - v0.3.12 - Fixed Location: Gantry Cranes not triggering - v0.3.13
## Client - Fixed Power Bonus and Malus not having an effect. - v0.2.7 - Resource Bonus giving NaN amount for Crafting Materials (twice) - v0.2.8 - Fanaticism not working when no previous race selected. - v0.2.9 - Chat Message showing the wrong player (yourself) giving you items, and then duplicating the message - v0.2.11 - Unlocking (most) species, so they can be selected - v0.2.12 - Added all the new options - v0.3.14 - Added a Stats page when you win because why not - v0.3.15
### Checklist - Made sure the APWorld Loads - Yes - Made sure the APWorld tests pass - Yes - Made sure the Client works - Yes - Made sure all APWorld features are added to the Client - Yes

entry.title: NSMBW v0.0.4
entry.content: # Bug fixes * Fix so work on frozen install

entry.title: UNBEATABLE Arcade v0.3.0a0
entry.content:
This update brings compatibility with UNBEATABLE version 1.8.2, which broke the mod due to a Unity Engine update.
Additionally, some new stuff was added: - Stages are now included in the randomizer, and are filler items just like characters. - Added an in-game console! Use it to send commands, get hints, or chat with your friends while you can't decide which song to play next. - Upgraded to a newer version of MultiClient.Net which should improve stability when connecting to large multiworlds.
The client is **compatible** with v0.2.x apworlds! You can update even if you have an ongoing async! The **apworld** is **NOT compatible** with v0.2.x clients!
Check [the README](https://github.com/AllPoland/unbeatAP/blob/main/README.md) for installation instructions.
The mod and apworld are both still early in development, and are not feature complete nor are there guarantees about stability.
**Please read the YAML options carefully and test your options before joining a lobby**, since the pacing and difficulty of the apworld is very volatile. It's currently very easy to make a randomizer that is way too short or way too long.
Any feedback or ideas are welcome in the "UNBEATABLE (PC)" thread in `#future-game-design` in the [Archipelago Discord](https://discord.gg/8Z65BR2)!

entry.title: YARGAllSetlists v26.3.29
entry.content:
This release includes version 1.0 of the Guitar Hero World Tour apworld as well as some changes made to every other apworld in this branch.
There is now a provided .zip file containing all of the metadata you need to make your songs work. No more manually editing the text files. I have adjusted the metadata in all of the games I have setup thus far. Your existing metadata may not match the new version and you may need to update some of your songs. Refer to the readme file if you get confused. You will NOT need to create new rips.
# Guitar Hero World Tour Release
Includes the 86 songs found on the retail disc, with an option to enable the Guitar Battles. Toggle "GHWT Guitar Battles" in the "Enabled Setlists" option.
# Guitar Hero 1 version 1.2
Significant metadata changes were made to most of the setlist. You may need to download the metadata zip file.
The "Guitar Hero 1 Hidden Songs" setlist has been renamed to "GH1 Hidden Songs"
# Rock Band 3 version 1.1
Only a couple songs had changes made to their metadata. You will likely be able to get by with just download the individual files directly from the repo.
"Oye Mi Amor" has been made optional due to some versions of the retail disc not ripping the song properly. It is now toggleable within the "Enabled Setlists" option as "RB3 Oye Mi Amor"
# All Setlists version 1.1
- Added YARN Request Pack 1 - Added Guitar Hero World Tour - Added GHWT Guitar Battles - Added the changes made in the other apworlds

entry.title: Vampire Survivors v0.3.2
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option: Include Arcana Enemies in Enemy Sanity, `enemysanity_arcana_enemies` - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option: Character Limiter, `character_pool_size` - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option: Stage Limiter, `stage_pool_size` - [ApWorld] Fixed Genya being listed as a base character - [ApWorld] Fixed Stage Hunt requiring 1 less stage than what you had to goal - [Client] Extended the deathlink grace period to be 10s - if you want it extended, turn off deathlink until you get better at the game - [Client] Fixed beating Eudai not registering

entry.title: MetroCUBEvania v0.2.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Convert Inline JS to typescript by @brev95 in https://github.com/ap-metrocubevania/ap-metrocubevania/pull/6
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ap-metrocubevania/ap-metrocubevania/compare/v_0.1.3...v_0.2.0

entry.title: Sonic Adventure DX v1.2.1rc0.post0
entry.content:
## [v1.2.1 pre-release 2] - 2026-03-29
### Changed:
- Updated APCpp to the latest version to improve connection speed and stability. - Entrances used are now written to data storage in bulk and no longer increase loading times.
### Fixed:
- Fixed crash when exiting the Chao Garden from the pause menu. - Fixed crash when using the Surge the Tenrec mod. - Added EC Deck and EC Bridge as starting locations. - Fixed some entrances being revealed early. - Fixed inconsistent emblem requirements between Deck and EC Inside.

entry.title: Schedule I v3.5.4
entry.content:
Rank Bagman III Rank Shot Caller I
Items added: Golden m1911 Golden m1911 unlock big sprinkler big sprinkler unlock

entry.title: CrossCode v0.8.2
entry.content:
# Changes from 0.8.1
## Changes to Generation
* Replaced the check **Vagabond Dojo Key** with **Trials of the Golden Bugs** (@CodeTriangle). * This change turns the check that gives the Dojo Key in vanilla into a quest reward so that the item hidden behind it can be previewed. * This new location has the same ID as the previous one, so this change only affects where in the cutscene the item is acquired.
## Changes to Mod
* Applied a series of changes to the Archipelago menus to make creating and playing games more intuitive (@CodeTriangle): - Allow any NG+ options to be selected regardless of previous save file completion. - No longer load into a game without NG+ enabled when exiting the text client menu using cancel button. - Add a clearer indication that NG+ options can be edited from the New Game Plus menu found in the Archipelago menu. - Block out "carry over" section of NG+ when editing options to indicate that they cannot be modified after save file creation. - Stop the game from blocking infinitely when entering new login information after previously entering login information and disconnecting.
# Changes from 0.8.2-pre.1
## Changes to Logic
* **Steamy Booze** now requires access to Bergen Trail so that Bergen Ice can be acquired (@CodeTriangle). * **Gaia's Garden Defeat** now requires access to East Gaia in Closed Gaia mode since enemies native to that area are necessary to the quest's completion (@CodeTriangle).

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.1.post3
entry.content:
REQUIRES 0.6.7 BUILD OF ARCHIPELAGO
Pre-release updates do not change spheres gamemode.
Added Universal Tracker integration. Added BattleSanity option [Experimental]. Added DespoilerSanity option [Experimental]. Added missing lizardmen buildings.
Exceeding admin capacity now provides increasing debuffs to the economy rather than an instant crippling debuff.
Traps/Filler that trade settlements now move the camera to the new settlement so the player knows it's happened.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/V0.9.0...v0.9.1

entry.title: Vampire Survivors v0.3.2
entry.content: - [Client] Fixed UI not behaving on Epic Games build of the game - [Client] Added support for DeathLink Groups - [Client] Changed how DeathLink sends (DeathLinks will only send when you click the revive button instead of just when the player dies) - Cons: - The final death in a run doesn't send a DeathLink - Can't send a DeathLink if you don't have revives - Pros: - Choose to Quit a run or send a DeathLink and Revive - Warn other DeathLinkers about sending a DeathLink - GateKeeping DeathLinks behind game progression - Prevents DeathLinks being sent from people who don't use endless

entry.title: Slime Rancher v0.2.3
entry.content: - [Client] Fixed a bug with DeathLink having delayed deaths - [Client] Buffed Progressive Market Stonks from +5% to +20% - [Client] Fixed a bug with 2 missing note locations - [Client] Support for DeathLink Groups

entry.title: Final Fantasy XIV v0.27.0
entry.content:
* Added The Merchant's Tale * Changed mcguffin count to be dynamic. The yaml setting is now a percentage. * Changed Dzemael Darkhold and The Howling Eye to be Level 44 instead of 46 (The minimum level to enter, rather than the level you get synced down to). This puts them in the lvl45 bracket instead of the already crowded lvl50 bracket.
* A whole lot of optimizations * Unused progression items are now removed from the pool. No raid keys if you're not doing raids, no zone access if there's no reason to go there. This was a huge amount of work under the hood, but should lead to a better experience. * Removed some redundant yaml settings * Updated to use RuleBuilder if you're on 0.6.7 or later (This is very good for generation speed) * If you generate a particularly small world, the generator can now choose less than 5 progression jobs. * Better error messages when you make a yaml that is physically unplayable (The fuzzer figured out that you can submit a yaml where your first check is in Bozja)

entry.title: Final Fantasy XIV v0.27.1
entry.content: * Fixed some Fishsanity bugs

entry.title: Donkey Kong Country 2 v3.1.0
entry.content: ### Final content update! ### Download trivia here (mandatory to play, not to generate): <https://github.com/TheLX5/DKC2-Trivia/releases/latest> # Info * Only the US 1.1/Rev 1 version is supported * MD5 US 1.1: `d323e6bb4ccc85fd7b416f58350bc1a2` * Universal Tracker support # Changes * FxPak: Ensures everything works properly (Mainly for QUsb2Snes users) * Implemented Rule Builder (bumps AP version to 0.6.7 minimum) * ~~Stolen from Astalon~~ tl;dr better UT `/explain` and `/get_logical_path` support * KONG letter progress is saved between levels loads * Added an Adjuster/Manager tool * The UX is very questionable, but it should work mostly fine * Added an adjuster option that allows you to guarantee DK Coins and G Letters in goals (Global) * Added an adjuster option that allows you to fully randomize which rewards are available at goals (Global) * Added a counter in each world that tells you how many level clears or McMuffins are required * Moved all of the Swanky Trivia options to the adjuster, they work in a global basis instead per YAML * Moved the trivia database to an independent APWorld * Removed custom trivia support from the APWorld (sorry if anyone was actually using this) * DeathLink: Deaths should no longer be sent when dying in a level and proceed to get into a "shop" level immediately after * Client: It's now possible to request several barrels at once with `/request` * Squawks now allows using backup barrels * Some changes to the death/hurt table, players can now die in several new kong states * Disabled being able to select Files 2 and 3 in the File Select menu * Cranky hints no longer consider events * Fixed a Cranky text variation that ended up displaying part of the next hint on the last line * Fixed Kongs phasing through Air Balloons when hit with an extra hit active * Fixed Kackle stopping when hitting the player when they only have one Kong unlocked and they have an extra hit active * Fixed K. Rool ignoring extra hits when hitting with his blunderbuss

entry.title: Hunie Cam Studio v0.3.2
entry.content:
- fixed error with archipelago seeds starting with 0 - made tutorials auto skip after collecting initial girl - fixed APWorld version not displaying correctly
V0.3.1 changelog - (Client) Added a check to see if your connecting from the same server as the last connection to allow for continuing a save (NOTE will only work on saves started after updating)
V0.3.0 changelog - fixed client not sending completion to server - fixed "$goal" working before reaching day 22 and not working afterwards
INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS:
CLIENT: - Have Hunie Cam Studio Installed - Download Hunie Cam Studio Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Cam Studio Archipelago Client v#.#.#.zip" to the directory where "HunieCamStudio.exe" is
APWORLD (needed for generating archieplago game): - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Spirit Valley APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Hunie Cam Studio APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Hunie Cam Studio YMAL

entry.title: Pokemon Crystal v5.4.1
entry.content:
# Changelog
## Features - Pokegear parts and berry trees are now plando'd to their original locations when they are not randomized and remote items is on. - :3
## Bug Fixes - Better marts now only affects the Pokecenter 2F mart, instead of overwriting all standard marts.
_This release is backwards compatible with seeds generated on 5.4.0_

entry.title: BKSimulator v1.0.2
entry.content: - Fixed the datastorage not properly supporting Teams. (This means any partial-walking-progress will be lost when loading an old game; i.e. you will be teleported back to home when you load an old game, regardless of if you were out on a walk or not, as the datastorage key has changed) - Updated apworld manifest (now properly reports world_version + minimum_ap_version)

entry.title: Dark Souls Remastered v0.1.0.0
entry.content:
Release version 0.1.0.0 ## Changes: * 8348b230bdf186c0d7f40e3826ab59877babf226 Merge pull request #98 from tathxo/v0.1.0-final-testing * 546899b88753d5ac3e357b3a7484bf887e07883e final v0.1 bits * d10bbfee0c6bdc52e85b6c48857081fab192ec93 Merge pull request #97 from tathxo/v0.1-lordvesselless * 147c3e7ff23d8f09cf64a46982cba1eb8711bd79 Update README.md * 8ac2df1d839f767b04964e28dfa402ca3de29612 Add CanWarpWithoutLordvessel * ff3401deaeb944af26f7c9bd95fead5b092eeeb0 Merge pull request #96 from tathxo/v0.1-updates * 7f710c0520a5101ca5ee9f7af5c3b61c26afa390 Update setup_en.md * 04e097efc10cb1ecdd1db3b9c51dc16570a1760f Merge branch 'v0.1-updates' of https://github.com/tathxo/DSAP into v0.1-updates * e99acd5eb05110d7e5a9cebc0ee4306f4bf51f66 Update setup_en.md * ab9bf07ae7c4fe92459a0d08b18d457ed79d7805 Fix typo
See More * bc7ba45fc6a6088f6d70ea715be3c28cbeb30090 Move game info into Game Page * 5a7d7c4600f6c941805c4e750ac1c5d68dd0a401 Fix typo * 3d77c065ae6bf0fad4d8e30a5d51bc7ebcae15eb Move game info into Game Page * 35d583a7d7a6fa59a317f48fec8dc00088764d66 Move setup to Setup Guide * f56be31d8e531534bf9dda44e018a6e06ffa100c Add Contributors * e1c04bc28b95d39f5b756ba6f0badb31df7762ad Merge pull request #95 from tathxo/v0.1-updates * fe9acdf52295be903ca879b4ba2e01c11bd5ccf7 Feature: Bonfire Warp Unlocks shared to co-op, new slots * 73bb1f7689f875dde5fcd275ae5137d13d5a4972 Merge pull request #94 from tathxo/v0.1-updates * 7f4b233849e9db4405570fce70afea4c216e5228 Update README.md * a04bfb8c816b3fb6f25d859c463c8cb774775059 Move Thief Items to Json File * 2d21455de241617ebabcdcf7ac5ad0f1d5efcfd9 Fix Param OoB issue * 63b629f1fdc7abe17ac2ef1dd0f2eed9a2fb659f Move Gifts to Json file * a670ec3045eb1018ff6790763fd6271b82d82ec3 Fix: Hellkite Bridge connection * c1b8efe97fd76e28184d66c212f6a4e43cd81a59 Fix: DA Logic - split Getting out of Cell region * a5ee688de45df7854b57b72d2a264b05dfbfc6ef Merge pull request #92 from Edgarra1619/main * 3927b0217a97e01df991badae0b2c97122566388 Merge pull request #93 from tathxo/v0.1-updates * ae25292801b5dbce21ae74cadb93293c002d371c Fix compatibility code for "beta" * b7c8b70ddb9d08b054ef3774dcbc4ffb65d19e2c Update README with Linux info * 201428de06fad8864a142d855f6c91ae68f7b71f Update README for v0.1.0 * fc5c26b47f9fa796c27b34f50d9ab27da8c80cb3 Add /lordvessel command * e399cb54f6814a028b92a3c302ac800ed71d49be Prevent Loop when using Save from previous room * 34a75725a189d2c0936251284b72286e4aa5d257 Update App.axaml.cs * 511c1b4ea441b552089e67c4af6045b382d0c126 Fix Basement Door Logic * 088e81f661d326c9f0cb1f041f20b4163478bd13 Update Compatibility code & apworld version * f8b2105753f11ca8feba0cbf4262fd8fe3cd66fe Create Controls window, Add popup options * 2a92f59ede176cf6a973d8c0961532ca75491bf2 Fix All DLC regions not containing boss fog walls * 894f21fe6741bb7e257792b838e14a78b61d9a05 Fix Duke's Archives logic bug * 68368046860d00727777bd6af1d24696f19ecb9a Fix Duke's Archives Giant Door logic bug * 719774cd572a8d46a755e927e3ac971c655bab1e Merge pull request #91 from tathxo/v0.1 * 35f4f6ec43f5bd25411c17c608bcad42b01a76f2 Make Server Deliver "Local" Items * f35560a2524ba5d04a311fc0e65671a7e9fb3515 Merge pull request #90 from tathxo/v0.0.22.1-hotfix * f24eaea2bf91f61abeaf3d7fdcf47bff78b1d03e Use Item Lot Param Ids for item lot replacement * 0406ad1267a65b1a8ffec9073b4d7d63213616d8 Refactor item lots * 79029992054459d8121bfb2388c755ee4c00cbea Refactor pt3 * d758559f5a0264f1c4e31d9add6917f60883f48b Refactoring pt2 * 0e243f0e29acdae1b3368b6c6d8006bda6563f8a refactoring pt1 * Loadout Rando Options to Apworld * 29fbcd149e48d6db0238ba8edd57f6372a34f25e Randomize Equipment/Armor * 765fe1786120fa178b453924c35ef96f2f8e0389 Starting Loadout & Gift Descriptions * randomization * 31b06755a5c1efa7393808d8043c9eea522a338f Use Weapon Stat Reqs * f54f9f2ce226a5ec1b6a290b30dcb63c5361e4c4 Simplify client log strings * 197e32b5073b686562661f17e198804f28780639 Add Stat Requirements for All Weapon Types * 48e962ca977166f6fdbf1811ae1596bb883ad1c5 Add spell categories and Reqs, and Reqs removals * 4e3459cfb30f7da7f6f7cc72da423e60e9ea338d Dark Hand -> Shields * 4317925bca44ca9f271cc7420083cbb3bb18629c Don't Loop Forever for Bad Items * 67f0fd95b88670decfc11ddb5ac4a97bd0f45780 Add Spell Randomization, Ensure Arrow matches Bow Type * 5a7a4453b8945374d2b3412e51b2a97fef801623 Add loadout item lots, Remove weapon stat reqs * a184a99ed9da6d38f6bbde94260e36bb4a57b7e3 Test itemlotparam addition + More Param Refactoring * 205842a7a5dc0a5fc587f43a47e6f376cf9e764b Refactor DSR Param Replacement * daeb174b97f7ff6560db6945e8f9216fe1860e9c Add v0.0.22.1 hotfix info to readme * a46efc269f82b425eccca167271c8cb317876364 Bump ready for v0.0.22.0 * 1bd1feb2528b2816f8098c058b080308cc61438c Merge pull request #85 from tathxo/22.0.5-pr-fixes-qol * 40c90ce862aca1148006db3d8f33e5d01c00b7b1 Cleanup Emk zero handling * support and Cleanup Generate Prints * 7efbbde6119507aff4e9c9d9c0d64d330fdb32f0 Merge pull request #83 from tathxo/22.0.5-pr-fixes-qol * 97f11b88a1e69306fd9686e5455aec1fa3e08603 Fix 9000 extra items 4e324197d3472412c97c7cb3df8e047e8648432b Add /warp Commands for Persistent Reachability * 6b14ef194b6b8305361afb4cde402ef15e522c9b Linux support work * ed8498babf278f571e22d1e3b622ba423762b7af Fix: Require Placeable Lordvessel to pass Gold Fog * 2e1107c1ef01edfafcfb55f521408945743a441f Merge pull request #81 from tathxo/22.0.4-helpersplit * 007966d84731d46938b97b36b9f5608f57651b56 Refactor Helpers.cs * 37b32628e87b8fa725e318f3af78c7509243cc59 Merge pull request #80 from tathxo/22.0-3-deps+apitems * fc99697e64a48fd1ec70917986c3708115df4816 Cleanup + Improve Messages * 4c4c24cdf70957a8edbc33640df165ffda9b9cb5 Improve Reconnection Handling somewhat * add0e923979b028161023200445849955350977d Filter DSR AP items -> unclutter inventory * 0ca7f89d2b5d463af3a06160a6ebb2a6ba5a6045 Improve Reconnect Detection and AP item handling * ad754309f18a71a811f639aa0d54fd99f0b71b90 Add item popup Filter & Refactor/Cleanup * f160b5606a62fee0c655bb8efc99f75b49f53d4c Only Popup Progression Items, add return values for asm * 53447913134d015eb982deed09dc603c8f67f6ad Item popup batching + avoid popup-based crashes * d7219d0734a0835759e4120e0a041667523a8be7 Item Popup - Don't Crash on load * dd8c5eb5044d7b3ace38b4ba964edf7d8acd99a4 Add popups for received items * d41885549627b052f5a81f33942895db5f4457ee Add Fogwall DSR items, remove old "condition reward" code * 5634149511b4037ad132a00364b486e9003a6619 Order events alphabetically * 3ad84d6f8b06c39f47e48a57de5968dcd4672ec8 Replace remote items with DSRAP items * 042e8e7e5a8acff7c431e4851b9f017e547fe075 Add all scouted AP items to DSR with full text * 6a931162bcf646b2af7e1d4b900611f75a45ecbe Proof of Concept - Add an item and update its name * 3c8aebcb4893a86ee84eaf47ad95f0ca706f1582 AP items as DSR items step 1 * 4fbaeef5e1397903028d15db45e98a4db8cf6409 Use ScoutLocations instead of Game Data Storage/Slot Data * ec828bc35106b3a84104b56a1aaa924dd6ded16e Update to 0.6.1 * 0b9a11b39b3c1d2990a7f86d78843ea186795063 Fix DLC boss fog walls * c526aa02bc387f7527069e6cd1e89f09c10cf4ae Merge pull request #79 from tathxo/22.0-itempool-merge * 628309ca1630a07135555460704df8d571938f8b Update README.md * 77e24c03f76488dd89ee3c79bcc53f3f522db423 Bump Version -> 0.0.22.0 * 2491c6efcaebc5997e534d0c3d5c2b2732f5b4a4 Add upgraded weapons & Quantity > 1 items handling to client * 8b39ed64f1393e183edbc6006a0a3395ae666424 Feature: Improved Item Pool generation + simplified options * caa08527fd96254d19157aa2163b0efa5de2133e Research Tools * 04bd61955bf1ba0fcaf3e95426806a6020bbc20b v0.0.21.1 beta * e39b909db14785a8a5efc1e9ac4e2ad6d8cbb9be Update azure-pipelines.yml for Azure Pipelines * cf9c0ee3924da7a8530e50987be7bec9680b9bf5 Add known issue to README.md * 12ca26da78aa3162e8482c1c917388f2cb9d15cd Merge pull request #78 from tathxo/22.0-item-stability * Add some known issues to README * db96a24d562c90eda4f630b1b81efe17fdeefe0e Update README.md * 0902675ef92914a7a82d2c00fe86894bce82f377 Update README.md * 16347896986161185a626418a51d83e2863d24a5 undo bad version change * 84f49593b60c48a58ded5816d86ef489774da139 Bump version to 0.1.0.0 [skip ci] * 3293a7c65d9f4d530d91df4a68af319f740abd0b Merge pull request #76 from tathxo/21.0-fixes+fogwalls+ * f11a90dbf0a41d18c45bb85403e16bc369b490d2 Improve handling of invalid options * 4b6f46e15248610cf1ed3b9615e4e36784e43cdd Merge pull request #75 from tathxo/21.0-fixes+fogwalls+ * 6acbb782343799f048c09fb5174de5cad317bb08 Feature: Add Fog Wall item and loc groups * 60856f7632606e349bea6294206a4e4dd9cf0732 Feature: Add Overlay Toggle * 07bfc2e5234f0286e03e761a8c3367b896cbacd5 Print Upgrade information to spoiler log * 61862940372af20b663712106c18a650b18d1644 Fixes for fuzzer + gen failures * a6943009fa305b7bbca8373f60b4dedc212b78cd Merge pull request #74 from tathxo/21.0-fixes+fogwalls * 93f86e967e4695bcfdd26eb6e1cfd4110f49ca92 Update /diag to also work if user isn't connected * be336185a729013004146bdf2235810b25677cf4 PR #74 feedback * 068b7330efc1aa5f1a67117eb61cc22833a06dba Fix some logic and add new /lock command * 842df324225db80412de876f10ade8f0f803045b v0.0.20.2 -> v0.0.21.0, + compatibility for v0.0.20.* * ecfc9905695d7022dad6f1d27d180065ab11f715 Various Logic fixes * 41d00601683b39b65128fa1268fac4e674837528 Separate Fogwall Location and Item names, improve boss fog wall names * 4ba566656be15a517e49c3aee805f3f55f12bd29 Update versions to 0.0.20.2, compatibility, versioning fixes+messages * 26806bfd6e8bb6fe7e69c7f5ced9aa9df4357274 Add useful debugging commands * c44a8fa2e12935165a47b2bf8f86a326fc3c44be Add changelog information & improve options documentation * 6222c20ad03fd5b4427e22c2ee47733edc6d0212 Make Artificial logic only apply without fogwall locking * 6ba577926d8080b67d934857d5f294e3c7f26ffb FIX: logic for NL Key to the Seal, remove uub -> db * eee688cfe3f6966ed039b94b7af16554c3fc8adc Add 2-way Entrance Logic for Backward-Traversable Regions * 0a02feb4fcdbd79a4518191ef5f7943f1162c54f Make SendGoal put its work on the scheduler to avoid deadlock * 32c8ac7580d6fe43f89e6d68c5b7cae697ab22c6 Switch Wait()s to async awaits * e404890238359386fc7ec308b7444e6c7e6523bc Slightly improve messaging for /goalcheck and /diag * 10200b6b1b873dea91c9372c2f9b3da98d37ded0 Add fog wall logic less verbosely * b8396d92231d4b9c51ec466e22b708da7338306d Feature: Fogwall sanity * 4a67dd976aa42ec0db3e0ba10a52111de594787c Feature: Fog Wall Locking * 62b0c4d87483977e86fdfba2229259ec581c4fdb Add UT->poptracker map support * 9e7668bca10af6e30ad738f328f9be7b95d39bcd More diag info for #73 * 31e26ad9f88bc9f5d38cc43c6dee2a12db261e61 Fix multiple SendGoalCompletion() calls happening at once * 411cc4eece8d8f153b2346512092e3b649e0cdbf PR review result * b157f53ccc8dbe0c097a6056a01f83ce6b6af0de Update client display version * 380e28373ba9f203dd1840730cc748e5040fad94 Add logging of goal send, Add /goalcheck and /diag * 029fdeb6fbad7bf87cdbacdba2665e29fbeaa711 Fix: Task.Delay() with no Wait() or await * b32ce46fdff2e94beb3b0a90e9402a7e7bd09ec5 Add location groups to readme * c93974c04974b8aa2a80d0b20b47f2175405d03a Update README.md * 831aed7c7f8c7c47c69f32525970eb55ae42e0ad Bump version to 0.0.20.0 [skip ci] * 39f92558a03a0c462a5ca4bcc50dfbac211d931c Merge pull request #72 from tathxo/20.2.1 * fbce35b3352485f0a70614b9edc8c301dd0d3743 Fix invalid "Weapon Upgrades" to Shields * 6db8c2792fc808686791b8f825d0f0d70d634eda Update README.md * fa4eed0da00f040e5d7887ac47ac2ed763247d9c Update README.md * 59d30c512af27fe08e9cb4c035e1f6db1b407d3e Update README.md * 896bbd97c8d29a2e505aa9d0b42ed45e5c32ad08 Update dependencies * 3467c954d4bba6b2876012f5e77cbc458ba1ce05 Merge pull request #71 from tathxo/20.2.1 * e54e94631a31428e0da01dd3f7952df3bd00f91e Fix: Handle Failed-Received Items * 7582050a10268536f1386f5aafe0b9c236591136 Merge pull request #70 from tathxo/20.2.1 * 36ac1c759c375fe49430e490f2b0118658a9294c Fix: Spells with "Soul" in Name Wrongly Added to Item Pool Instead of Soul Items * 9db921050bac0586525ef279eca60327b8276d03 Merge pull request #69 from tathxo/20.2.1 * 2b17868e7d99d76fa15d44853003ab31e3bae7a5 Add Changelog and Roadmap to README * f8e7edc56b28d8ce517e5255772c0f977cc3f6e7 Merge pull request #68 from tathxo/20.2.1 * 15217ec6d441d01d6f8b8a89982a0c9756c5994d Add /deathlink command for toggling it after yaml creation * 0e61dbd154e2a089177123ed70a0267c733e366d Fix typo in warning message * a6e83cee82e8512c21e17351729bde9c283be6cd Add DLC location OT: Soul of a Hero behind Stairs * 1fd5b0771ec6694391dedfc376cd70d385a17aff Fix spam of Debug Log level * 4d9e88172a1b356f31041d3f2bffd0516daf5bed Merge pull request #67 from tathxo/20.2.1 * 0d773fd7957e7713f70959b41f43ecd79634f7cc Improve AoB Helper * 0126186951499a5b95f378de197454b2d0a896f1 Merge pull request #66 from tathxo/20.2.1 * f007560b54cf159482c903dc258e6bdc7808f7af Fix deathlink, add AoB Helper class, some cleanup * 64ff417abd2b20991ab72b9e52f504a01344bbcb Update README.md * a1dd8ed1481fe186ab17709e64e4f37823e3d2fd Merge pull request #65 from tathxo/20.2.1 * 997e03d23c0d1caba3b69b67008350b30059ab54 Update logic and hint text on a PW check * b378e8a1e72ca237a728d8a19d1f8a25ea0f8d93 Limit number of "discrepancy" warnings, put an error message out * f7d7f23eba58f8d04d2b5c56d305f7537a5d6862 Fix: Locations Names Consistency ("Caverns" -> "Cave") * 3b7c3bc8c43fe5d85426957f6d09161b358fe83b Add an apworld "api version" to the slotdata * a3c1db5cb31fa22722f2759172cc1b8e88898308 Merge pull request #64 from tathxo/20.2.1 * 0df72ffcd35516f8cd4567bf0772669a64097de1 Feature: Unstuck Button Support * 0671fbfca325c26aba6449274766b222c978c918 Feature: Prevent Firelink Chest behind Frampt from Breaking Logic * d54ad7512824c946c2efb78d17b5ca5e9691bbad Merge pull request #62 from tathxo/20.1-candidate * 793a1880a6a15ac04d728b0ca1f3ed17f8611a67 Add Item Name Groups * 46b22557242679f069f60a0e5b2efe0828a0ff59 Merge pull request #61 from tathxo/19.4-fixes * c08d3eaec65a0a99f39800dbe8f64fdcf85969f0 Split Blighttown region into a Lower and Two Upper regions * a662b4502e49f903db56ae7fa2f3eedbae9456ff Add location groups (including DLC group), remove enable_dlc yaml option * d4131613b628ff1114be5174ede7089f71144f24 Standardize Region Names * 2ff8ce1a2dd2e82c563fca6ea64d8766e23cdd31 Fix up Post-Seath Arena entrance logic * c03a913830557433befda90fc2d1513923e4ab84 Merge pull request #54 from tathxo/19.4-fixes * 1634755085f2a71a9548380211689a6b1ad26ea1 Fix: PW Gold Coin -> Before Annex Key * dc7da04cd5dfd7767f157b826c8a6951fb3baf14 Merge pull request #52 from tathxo/19.4-fixes * 286541ce87d2acee4a6204e8aee81016b46f4b84 Fix: Make Goal a normally Monitored Location * 8d1c3d7ef00534084c56f977f5b99da8bd50c896 Update README.md * 956641198d48d566ee941b8d0d5eb677df12c83e Merge pull request #50 from tathxo/19.3-dlc+ * c5b7db156d7b211e6d72e6a3ec5de2fa0bcb1b06 Send Error message if no items were overwritten, Add overlay messages * a705814c46afd5926d7178027a137454390e7189 Feature - Enable DLC (via yaml option) * 654aa34c9c9e4d1abb1b6fdcab74eb8fde4a2fa3 Merge pull request #49 from tathxo/19.2+ * e2f31df919d0e3d8af8f852bb2c0ac77133f70bb Fix 1 incorrect item lot flag & 2 bad logic locations in Painted World * d55c477dc79be99fae58764c1e42a0f86a651f97 Merge pull request #48 from tathxo/19.2+ * 65730d2133be786a99387cecde145104f3980166 Feature: Weapon Upgrades Yaml Option * c6072af9dcd3dc8013e05163a097dda61c814b59 Update README.md * 3e4a43945213fd971739c306d2cab495bd65eb7c Merge pull request #47 from tathxo/19.2+ * 67414529f2cb7334bcdc1cd07e31d10b43483e1b Move Embers to their own resource file * a8f2b16f1b1dde65b44c234cd679664da96486a8 Update README.md * 9a7acd9d4b564a618e9cda3d84072cd6ca846f07 Make Embers useful - and Require them to be in the Item Pool * b37fdd98c0e485edbba2a39c823d079bf2675ff9 Add Elite Cleric Armor Set to Armor.json * 69b2a6d9674f2f6781b140c06eac132a00eb783d Remove nonexistent location * 0d65f6b943a597a87804f38d79554687ced438d4 Stop Replacing Every Single item lot * b462619846ef670f02c2814dbc336e7e238da232 Update README.md * 01f766f85b8e7442378f6f3aef49c47615f4dd05 Merge pull request #46 from tathxo/main * 31696f3477f2e691115fec4cff5657522cf9f3e5 Document Known Issues: Firelink Shrine chest and some npc/enemy drops erroneously replaced * c0d94a57f97e8a87e70b16d746bf48c1f9781a28 Update azure-pipelines.yml for Azure Pipelines * e6e6d18048daee395d3de9bce6ef88569714caac Update azure-pipelines.yml for Azure Pipelines * 438c9b8c4e6c63362d7c6976dc3421d76cba74ca Update azure-pipelines.yml for Azure Pipelines * ce3b2af505486109ceed098ab6a38fcc7a98e2bc Update azure-pipelines.yml for Azure Pipelines * 619a6bbb5de2e7d1dac8a312aaf8f50eadd44ddc Merge branch 'main' of https://github.com/ArsonAssassin/DSAP * 867f4b47e44afbb3bca20aaace105b5468ece0f9 Update avalonia package * 74af9a440531da2d438753345385bcc0f50d9ed9 Merge pull request #45 from tathxo/0.0.18.4c * b8827d7507cf37453c6729a69a215e889645b864 Add Overlay messages and Offset Overlay messages below hp + status bar * 13dfe3af9919d319391eab241dd26c31eecd0ac4 Update to latest AvaloniaGUI package * e7dc93dce96e93a2f818e9b3c3971cffd4a654f9 Merge pull request #44 from tathxo/0.0.18.4c * 19cf20aec75d63cefde0c7d5c496af2dd58df5f8 Updated README.md * c1469f32874a47684239a6b896a9a7bd1d90a07c More README enhancements * f07df8c51610730247f61804be2bff0ab67f0c56 Minor updates for PR #44 * 7da0941ed64f3536e01ed546c514c89c1b2d66c4 Merge pull request #43 from tathxo/0.0.18.4 This list of changes was [auto generated](https://dev.azure.com/arsonassassin/DSAP/_build/results?buildId=150&view=logs).

entry.title: Frogmonster v0.2.5
entry.content:
_APWorld version 0.2.5, generated from commit [7871b3a](https://github.com/Rooby-Roo/Archipelago/commit/7871b3a936294a9c745c97f6a14aabc4a6feb9cb)_.
A quick fix to Universal Tracker.
- Universal Tracker now accounts for the death_link setting set at generation. Yeah, death_link has logical implications in this world. I'm not apologizing for that.

entry.title: Path of Exile v1.3.2
entry.content:
# 1.3.2 patch notes:
## Bug fixes: - Fixed a generation bug where it would only assign one version of your starting weapon.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stubobis1/Archipelago/compare/1.3.2...1.3.1

entry.title: evolve_v0.3.16 v0.3.16.post2
entry.content:
# Evolve Incremental v0.3.16
Free - Unstable - APWorld Only
[client](<https://the1stburb.github.io/Evolve>) | [apworld](<https://github.com/the1stburb/EvolveAPWorld>)
### Do I need to redownload the APWold?
No
## Client - Added a [online YAML editor](<https://the1stburb.github.io/Evolve/yaml.html>) - v0.3.16
Basically all it does is makes lets you choose the options and then downloads the yaml.
### Checklist - Made sure the APWorld Loads - No - Made sure the APWorld tests pass - No - Made sure the Client works - Yes - Made sure all APWorld features are added to the Client - No

entry.title: Links Awakening DX Beta v13.4.2
entry.content: Fixes issue with follower setting that was breaking gen if not set

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.5.3
entry.content:
# Version 0.5.3 Minor fix to ssl errors, particularly on linux. Reach out if encountering any further problems.
## Bug fixess * Applied SabreCat's ssl fix from issue #4 in client.py

entry.title: Donkey Kong Country v1.2.3
entry.content:
Small update with Rule Builder + `/get_logical_path` and `/explain` support in Universal Tracker.
# Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/dkc/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/dkc/changelog/#1.2.2)

entry.title: Final Fantasy XIV v0.27.2
entry.content: * Fixed bug with new McGuffin calculation method.

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Spirit Tracks v0.7.2
entry.content:
Works with seeds generated in v0.7.x [Setup guide and useful info](https://github.com/DayKat/spirit-tracks/blob/main/worlds/tloz_st/docs/setup.md) ## Bugfixes - Fixed train speed stuff crashing when reloading the client on the overworld - fixed client trying to send 0 rabbit total locations - prevented crash on vanilla bow chest from trying to remove the bow as a normal item rather than a progressive one - fixed coordinates for Marine Temple 2f log chest - fixed Snurglar keyring not opening mountain temple - fixed guards blocking Hyrule castle after visiting pirate hideout - fixed mountain temple not opening properly without mountain temple tracks - fixed some buggy behavior with removing vanilla progressive bow - fixed Skeldritch not sending dungeon reward - added extra safety to item detection for saving in boss rooms - moved Steem back into sanctuary for snow source gift without flute - made Carben respawn in papuzia with vanilla passengers if you lost him - fixed Wadatsumi papuzia crash - added flag to make Desert Temple 2F always possible without sand wand - fixed cuccos not spawning in dune sanctuary if no cargo is randomized - fixed vanilla tear of light option still creating extra tear items - allowed duplicate Yeko to trigger his items
## New Stuff - made warp to start actually refill ammo - added missing location `ToS 21F Bomb Wall Chest` - added the following tricks to glitched logic - ToS 1F clip onto push block - ToS 13F key skip with either boomerang or whip - ToS 15F gap boost with bombs and whirlwind - ToS 26F skip - marine temple jumpslash bomb boost to boss key - mountain temple 1F small key skip (both oob and boomerang single key skip) - desert temple boss key skip

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v0.3.1
entry.content:
A quick fix to a potential crash-inducing bug. The client is compatible with v0.3.0 generated worlds.
Download a new apworld and options template below and have a good one! If this is your first time playing MKDD AP, here's the [setup guide](docs/en_Setup.md) and [readme](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash).
## Changes * Add version requirement to yaml template by @aXu-AP in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/72
## Fixes * Fix crash on entering character select by @aXu-AP in https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/pull/71
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v0.3.0...v0.3.1

entry.title: Manual_ResidentEvil4_VincentsSin v2.0.10
entry.content: - Fix generation errors if `Merchant_Upgrades` and/or `Merchant_Exclusives` are enabled while `Merchant_Weapons` is disabled. - Additionally, `Merchant_Exclusives` also will not populate if `Merchant_Upgrades` is disabled.
